title: BENEFITSCHECKUP - 211info
text: NATIONAL COUNCIL ON AGING BENEFITSCHECKUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The BenefitsCheckup assists in determining eligibility for food, prescription, health care, utility assistance, and other benefit programs 251 18th Street S Suite 500 Arlington, VA 22202 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 5am-4pm Email (800) 794-6559 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (800) 794-6559 Benefitscheckup Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Enter age, income, and zip code on the website to find eligible programs FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Benefits Screening * Older Adult/Aging Issues Senior Advocacy Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATIONAL COUNCIL ON AGING
